pricing.metaDescription: Simple, transparent pricing for AI agents built for physical therapy and rehabilitation professionals. Start free for 14 days.
pricing.title: Simple, transparent pricing
pricing.subtitle: Start free for 14 days. No contracts. Cancel anytime.

faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.a1: Yes. Cancel whenever you want — no contracts, no cancellation fees. You keep access until the end of the billing period.
faq.a2: All plans include a 14-day free trial. No credit card required to start.
faq.a3: All rehabilitation specialties: physical therapy, occupational therapy, sports rehab, neurological rehab, pediatric PT, and more.
faq.a4: Yes. Upgrade or downgrade at any time from your billing settings. Changes take effect at the next billing cycle.
faq.a5: RehabStack is built with HIPAA-aware infrastructure. All data is encrypted in transit and at rest. We never share patient data.

content-engine.name: Content Engine
content-engine.shortDescription: Transform voice notes, photos, and videos into professional social media content, patient education materials, and marketing copy.
content-engine.description: Content Engine is your AI-powered marketing assistant built for rehab professionals. Drop in a voice memo from your car, a quick video of a patient exercise, or a photo from the clinic — and Content Engine turns it into polished Instagram captions, patient handouts, newsletter sections, and more. It understands rehab terminology, speaks your specialty, and keeps your brand consistent across every platform. Stop spending evenings writing content. Let Content Engine handle the words while you handle the patients.

ce-matcher.name: CE Matcher
ce-matcher.shortDescription: Find the perfect continuing education courses matched to your specialty, license requirements, location, and budget.
ce-matcher.description: CE Matcher eliminates the hours you spend searching for continuing education that actually fits your life. Tell it your license state, renewal deadline, specialty focus, budget, and preferred format — live, online, or hybrid — and it surfaces the best-matched courses from hundreds of providers. It tracks your CE credits, alerts you when renewal windows open, and even suggests course sequences that build toward advanced certifications. Never scramble for last-minute CE again.

course-creator.name: Course Creator
course-creator.shortDescription: Turn your clinical expertise into a structured online course with AI-guided curriculum design, slide decks, and assessment questions.
course-creator.description: Course Creator helps rehab professionals monetize their expertise by building professional online courses in a fraction of the time. Describe your clinical knowledge area, your target audience, and your learning objectives — Course Creator generates a full curriculum outline, lesson scripts, slide deck structure, quiz questions, and even a suggested pricing strategy. Whether you want to sell on your own site or list on a major platform, Course Creator gives you the scaffolding to go from expert to educator without starting from a blank page.

onboarding.title: Become a Creator
onboarding.subtitle: Share your clinical expertise with rehab professionals worldwide.
onboarding.connectStripeDesc: We use Stripe to send you payouts. You will be redirected to Stripe to complete setup.
onboarding.successMessage: Your account is ready. Welcome to the RehabStack creator community.
terms: You retain full ownership of your agent intellectual property.
RehabStack takes 20-25% commission on managed agent subscriptions.
Agents must comply with RehabStack quality and compliance standards.
Patient data must never be stored in your agent backend.
You are responsible for keeping your agent knowledge base up to date.
RehabStack may pause or delist agents that violate terms.
Payouts are processed monthly via Stripe Connect.
